name: El Paso Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Salsa; Old El Paso chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure half a cup of salsa and drain it.
2. Beat together with cream cheese and set aside.
3. In an 11x7-inch baking dish, combine the remaining salsa and enchilada sauce, reserving half a cup of sauce. Stir in the rice and set aside.
4. Pound the chicken breast halves to about one-half inch thickness.
5. Spoon a quarter of the cream cheese mixture into the center of each chicken breast half.
6. Roll up each piece and place seam side down on the rice.
7. Repeat with all the breast halves.
8. Pour the reserved sauce over the chicken.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45-60 minutes, or until the chicken is done.
